content: Enabled dark mode preference for user interface in dashboard; saved theme setting persistently.
Deployed backend service using Docker Compose with Postgres and Redis; health checks passing in staging.
Edge memory system: using keyword hashing and cosine similarity for semantic recall on Jetson Nano.
Core rule: never send network requests from edge mode; all data stays local in JSON.
Q: How to export memories? A: Generate Markdown summary and include top tokens and statistics.
Daily log: Investigated Jaccard similarity for query-token matching; added stopword removal and lowercasing.
Instruction: When memory limit reached, evict oldest entries and keep vector index compact.
Solution: Configured voice-call plugin; API keys stored locally; tested call setup and audio quality.
Capability: Supports semantic search with token sets, union intersection calculations, and tie breaking by time.
Daily log: Raspberry Pi performance profiling; memory usage under ten megabytes; optimized hashing.
